rationale.R1.1: Identifies multiple conceptual issues and provides a tighter framing with precise citations, meeting the s=5 criteria.
rationale.R1.2: Flags several inconsistencies but doesn't walk through the entire argument chain end-to-end.

rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for some claims but not all, fitting s=3.

rationale.RX.4: Harm-free and identifies harmful patterns in the original draft, fitting s=5.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites traced but minor edits not annotated, so s=3.
